rounds.implementation_report:
Goal `00000SZ2AEZ6VGKY6RCG1YW00A` is ready for review at commit `eeb703bc01dc248cf3ea6dc03cb405bfe2aaf73a`.

After-action report:

- Changed the New Goal modal to use 60% of desktop viewport width, with a taller prompt editor and responsive mobile sizing.
- Added a browser contract test to protect the new layout.
- Reason: longer prompt templates can now be read and edited without constant scrolling.
- `node --test tests/*.test.js`: passed, `9/9`.
- `cargo test --lib --bins -- --test-threads=1`: passed, `389/389`; binary target `0/0`.
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`: passed.
- Static assets: passed, `53` files found.
- `git diff --check`: passed.
- Final worktree: clean on the goal branch.

Goal-agent runtime: approximately 5 minutes 16 seconds.
rounds.prompt: Make the new goal model larger, say 60% of the viewport, so that the prompt textbox can be larger so that the user can read a longer template they are writing without needing to scroll once it is beyond 1-2 sentences.
